description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The house features a flat or low-pitched roof and a mix of exterior wall finishes, likely including painted stucco or siding. The front yard is landscaped with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is set back from the street and flanked by greenery. Windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, with some larger panes facing the front and smaller ones on the sides and rear. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall or fence, and a driveway leads to a garage or carport on one side. The backyard is spacious, providing ample outdoor space for recreation or gardening.
description: A single-story suburban house with a flat roof, landscaped front yard, and asymmetrical window placement, surrounded by trees and a boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage/carport area, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, more trees, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, paved walkway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
